message:
fix(dashboard): use local IP for terminal SSH and fix metrics FIFO

Two issues fixed:

1. Terminal SSH now uses local IP instead of Tailscale hostname
   - Added GetVMIP to DaemonAPI interface chain
   - Terminal handler looks up VM IP from DHCP leases
   - Uses regular SSH with StrictHostKeyChecking disabled for ephemeral VMs
   - Added user selection dropdown (mooby/root) in terminal panel

2. Metrics FIFO initialization order fixed
   - Open FIFO for reading before calling SetMetrics
   - This allows Firecracker to successfully open it for writing
   - Fixes "No such device or address" error

Note: SSH still requires the daemon to have authorized keys in the VMs.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
